description_long: This object is a modern HP laptop with a slim, rectangular form factor and a metallic gray finish. The front features a large display screen with thin bezels, showing the Windows 10 operating system desktop, and a full-sized keyboard with a numeric keypad. The touchpad is centered below the keyboard, and there are visible stickers on the right palm rest area. The back of the display lid displays the HP logo in a dark, circular design. Multiple ports are visible along the left and right edges, including USB, HDMI, and audio jacks. The laptop rests on a patterned mat, emphasizing its portable and compact design suitable for urban environments.
description: A slim, metallic gray HP laptop with a large screen, full keyboard, and visible ports and stickers, resting on a patterned mat.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with Windows 10 desktop, full keyboard, touchpad, and stickers on the right palm rest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's thin profile, open screen, and visible left-edge ports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed-back of the screen with the HP logo centered on the lid.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the laptop's slimness, open screen, and right-edge ports.
attribute_brand_logo: HP logo, centered on the back of the display lid, circular with stylized 'hp' letters.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and turned on, displaying the Windows 10 desktop with application windows visible.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and numeric keypad; standard English language keys.
attribute_sticker_placement: Two stickers on the right palm rest area, one blue and one white, with visible text and graphics.
